sql_array: CREATE TABLE Categories (CategoryID INT PRIMARY KEY, CategoryName VARCHAR(15));
CREATE TABLE Products (ProductID INT PRIMARY KEY, ProductName VARCHAR(40), CategoryID INT, FOREIGN KEY (CategoryID) REFERENCES Categories(CategoryID));
INSERT INTO Products (ProductID, ProductName, CategoryID) VALUES (101, 'SQL Fundamentals', 1), (102, 'Smartphone', 2);

SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT c.CategoryID, c.CategoryName, p.ProductName, p.ProductID FROM Categories c, Products p WHERE p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID AND c.CategoryID IS NOT NULL FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');
SELECT bif:st_distance(POINT(1, 2), POINT(3, 4)) AS distance, xml_auto_schema('SELECT * FROM Products WHERE CategoryID = 1 FOR XML AUTO', 'productSchema') AS productSchema;

SELECT c.CategoryID, xml_auto_schema('SELECT p.ProductName, p.ProductID FROM Products p WHERE p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID FOR XML AUTO', 'products') AS productsSchema FROM Categories c WHERE c.CategoryID IN (SELECT DISTINCT CategoryID FROM Products) GROUP BY c.CategoryID HAVING COUNT(c.CategoryID) > 0;

SELECT bif:st_distance(POINT(NULL, NULL), POINT(1.0, 1.0)) AS distanceNull, xml_auto_schema('SELECT p.ProductID, p.ProductName, p.CategoryID FROM Products p WHERE p.ProductName IS NOT NULL FOR XML AUTO', 'productDetails') AS productDetailsSchema;

SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT c.CategoryName, bif:st_distance(POINT(c.CategoryID, 0), POINT(0, 0)) AS calculatedDistance FROM Categories c FOR XML AUTO', 'categoryDistance') AS categoryDistanceSchema WHERE c.CategoryName = '';
SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT p.ProductName, bif:st_distance(POINT(0,0), POINT(NULL, NULL)) FROM Products p WHERE p.ProductName = '' FOR XML AUTO', 'emptyNameSchema') AS emptySchema;
